chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 262 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.1099/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.1104 /2024 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 24.04.2024 Mr. Ashfaque Ahmed Bugti, Advocate along with petitioners. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statements have been filed on behalf of / by respondents No.2 and 4, which are taken on record. Respondent No.4 (SIP Pir Bux Bhutto of Anti-Rape Cell, Ghotki / IO of the case) is present, files a copy of statement of alleged abductee Mst. Dur Naz (Petitioner No.1) recorded u/s 161 CrPC, and states that as per her statement, she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Nadeem Shah (Petitioner No.2) with her own accord and freewill and is living happily with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She has further stated that her brother (Respondent No.5) has lodged a false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted or enticed by anyone. IO further states that he will file a copy of such statement along with his report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the subject FIR in accordance with law. Learned Counsel along with petitioners, on being satisfied with the statement of IO, does not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed.

Accordingly, the same stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
